subcodes.first_line: O thou who art compassionate to the bereaved! Thy services to the families and dependents of the martyrs are, in truth, a source of joy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهربان ببازماندگان شهداء خدمات تو باهل و عیال شهداء فی الحقیقه مورث سرور
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort
